global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a central content area showcasing an exclusive offer.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive viewing offer for BingeLayer.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Content area
elements.description: A rectangular content area in the center, featuring abstract shapes like circles and rectangles in lighter shades.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: An arrangement of abstract shapes, including a large rectangle and a circle, in a lighter blue tone.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangle positioned within the content area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small element
elements.description: A small circular element that appears to be a decorative feature within the content area.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Exclusive tonight Cancel anytime' in a bold, clear font, prominently displayed in the content area.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo 'BingeLayer' appears at the top in a bold font, contrasting against the blue background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom labeled 'Watch now' in a clear, inviting font, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' appears at the top left, indicating user-generated content, in a simple font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, BingeLayer, exclusive offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main content area is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
